2604.09123.title: Prototype-Regularized Federated Learning for Cross-Domain Aspect Sentiment Triplet Extraction
2604.09123.paper_summary: Aspect Sentiment Triplet Extraction (ASTE) aims to extract all sentiment triplets of aspect terms, opinion terms, and sentiment polarities from a sentence. Existing methods are typically trained on individual datasets in isolation, failing to jointly capture the common feature representations shared across domains. Moreover, data privacy constraints prevent centralized data aggregation. To address these challenges, we propose Prototype-based Cross-Domain Span Prototype extraction (PCD-SpanProto), a prototype-regularized federated learning framework to enable distributed clients to exchange class-level prototypes instead of full model parameters. Specifically, we design a weighted performance-aware aggregation strategy and a contrastive regularization module to improve the global prototype under domain heterogeneity and the promotion between intra-class compactness and inter-class separability across clients. Extensive experiments on four ASTE datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms baselines and reduces communication costs, validating the effectiveness of prototype-based cross-domain knowledge transfer.
2604.09123.paper_summary_zh: 方面情感三元組提取（ASTE）旨在從句子中提取所有方面術語、意見術語和情感極性的情感三元組。現有的方法通常在孤立的個別數據集上進行訓練，未能共同捕捉跨領域共享的共同特徵表示。此外，數據隱私限制阻礙了集中數據的聚合。為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了基於原型的跨域跨度原型提取（PCD-SpanProto），這是一種原型正則化的聯邦學習框架，旨在使分佈式客戶端能夠交換類別級原型，而不是完整的模型參數。具體而言，我們設計了一種加權性能感知聚合策略和一個對比正則化模塊，以改善在領域異質性下的全局原型，以及促進客戶端之間的類內緊密性和類間可分離性。對四個ASTE數據集的廣泛實驗表明，我們的方法超越了基準，降低了通信成本，驗證了基於原型的跨域知識轉移的有效性。
2604.09123.author: Zongming Cai et.al.
2604.09123.authors: Zongming Cai, Jianhang Tang, Zhenyong Zhang, Jinghui Qin, Kebing Jin, Hankz Hankui Zhuo
